name: wacli
description: Interactive WhatsApp command-line tool (Baileys) with a locally-stored session: send text and files, list chats and groups, watch incoming messages.

scripts.setup: git config core.hooksPath .githooks && echo "✓ pre-commit guard enabled (.githooks)"
scripts.prepare: git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1 && git config core.hooksPath .githooks || true
